return(function(F,J,N,b,S,B,I,i,y,Z,E,d,A,g,m,l,a,z,W,C)a,d,z,E,y,g,W,m,l,Z,C,A,i=function(F)for p=497168+-497167,#F,-265417-(-265418)do z[F[p]]=(380898+-380897)+z[F[p]]end if N then local q={[f]=e,[u]=j,[n]=T;[P]=Y,[K]=w;[V]=v;[t]=M;[h]=U,[Q]=O;[x]=D,[L]=R,[X]=o,[Fk]=pk;[lk]=Jk,[Nk]=bk;[Sk]=Bk;[Ik]=mk;[zk]=Ck;[ik]=ak,[gk]=Wk;[dk]=Zk;[Ek]=Ak;[yk]=fk;[qk]=ek,[jk]=Tk;[nk]=uk,[Pk]=Yk;[Kk]=sk;[ck]=kk,[wk]=Vk,[Gk]=vk,[tk]=Mk,[hk]=Uk;[Qk]=Hk,[Ok]=Dk;[Lk]=xk;[rk]=Rk;[Xk]=ok;[Fr]=pr,[lr]=Jr;[Nr]=br,[Sr]=Br,[Ir]=mr,[zr]=Cr[-134677+134678];[Cr[169744-169742]]=Cr[646808+-646805],[Cr[957863-957859]]=Cr[-617103+617108];[Cr[-1034999-(-1035005)]]=Cr[423992+-423985];[Cr[-763935+763943]]=Cr[-1039809-(-1039818)],[Cr[636352+-636342]]=Cr[-229995+230006];[Cr[-49616+49628]]=Cr[1043883+-1043870],[Cr[793883+-793869]]=Cr[-586601+586616];[Cr[-699050-(-699066)]]=Cr[574970-574953];[Cr[778274-778256]]=Cr[559942+-559923];[Cr[-25274+25294]]=Cr[426384+-426363],[Cr[-911674-(-911696)]]=Cr[105776-105753];[Cr[404621+-404597]]=Cr[-5229+5254];[Cr[85804-85778]]=Cr[607845-607818];[Cr[-853535-(-853563)]]=Cr[400319-400290],[Cr[681865-681835]]=Cr[-298529+298560],[Cr[-154420-(-154452)]]=Cr[-349513+349546];[Cr[-236641+236675]]=Cr[332629-332594],[Cr[537217+-537181]]=Cr[-392822+392859],[Cr[993890+-993852]]=Cr[-241856-(-241895)],[Cr[-214346-(-214386)]]=Cr[857745+-857704],[Cr[-702225+702267]]=Cr[-434738+434781];[Cr[-50663+50707]]=Cr[501060-501015],[Cr[-945187+945233]]=Cr[3365-3318];[Cr[618432+-618384]]=Cr[-532159+532208],[Cr[330906+-330856]]=Cr[243240-243189];[Cr[-519936-(-519988)]]=Cr[-196225+196278];[Cr[960363-960309]]=Cr[-464119-(-464174)];[Cr[-331560+331616]]=Cr[-819388-(-819445)];[Cr[-939634+939692]]=Cr[547771+-547712];[Cr[143223+-143163]]=Cr[804659+-804598],[Cr[-755739+755801]]=Cr[371009+-370946];[Cr[-1035285+1035349]]=Cr[-349508+349573],[Cr[267191+-267125]]=Cr[-297638-(-297705)];[Cr[798646+-798578]]=Cr[480916-480847],[Cr[1021670+-1021600]]=Cr[886935-886864],[Cr[-50330-(-50402)]]=Cr[336596+-336523];[Cr[568568-568494]]=Cr[-125328-(-125403)],[Cr[-654075-(-654151)]]=Cr[-3078-(-3155)],[Cr[93070-92992]]=Cr[491673+-491594],[Cr[869879+-869799]]=Cr[857306-857225];[Cr[738764-738682]]=Cr[-411576-(-41165
